Bradford-on-Avon Local Guide

Our favourite town

We fell in love with Bradford on Avon and have always encouraged friends and family to visit if they have not discovered it yet. Now we have our own little cottage in the centre, open to holiday guests who appreciate gems like BOA.

Stay with us on Airbnb B Stay with us on Booking.com

View The Stables

Walks

Canal routes, meadow loops, and viewpoints with realistic timings.

History

Saxon church, Tithe Barn, bridge history, and must-see landmarks.

Bath Day Trip

Roman Baths, museums, and easy family ideas one short train away.

Eat & Drink

Pubs, restaurants, and cosy spots for long lunches and evenings.

Stay

Why The Stables works as a calm base right in the heart of BOA.
